summary: Tested Cinematic Event System for CineWorld Studios. Backend event_templates.py generates events with correct probability (30% base, quality modifier) and COMING SOON only rare+. Frontend AutoTickNotifications polls /auto-tick/events, shows toast for common/rare, VelionCinematicEvent for epic/legendary. Anti-spam 20s cooldown implemented. Manual buttons (Riscuoti Ora, STELLE NATE) confirmed removed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cinematic event system is fully functional. Events trigger automatically for films in 'in_theaters' and 'coming_soon' (rare+ only for coming_soon). 12h cooldown per title, 30% base chance modified by quality. Effects apply to real DB (revenue, hype, fame). UI shows toast for common/rare, VelionCinematicEvent with blackout→matrix→Velion→event card for epic/legendary. Anti-spam 20s between cinematics. Manual buttons removed.

event_templates.py.generate_event_quality_modifier: PASS - higher quality increases trigger chance
